sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἰσκαριώτης

- Transliteration: Iskariotes

- Phonetic: is-kar-ee-o'-tace

- Definition: Iscariot = "men of Kerioth"

1. the apostle who betrayed Jesus

- Origin: of hebrew origin probably H377 and H7149

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin (probably [H377] and [H7149]); inhabitants of Kerioth; Iscariotes (that is Keriothite) an epithet of Judas the traitor: - Iscariot.
